episodes.title: 4 Investigates: Inside the Epstein investigation
episodes.description:
A criminal investigation centered on the former Zorro Ranch has placed New Mexico at the center of a case with national implications, as state investigators search for evidence tied to alleged crimes at the remote property once owned by convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

episodes.title: Epstein Truth Commission: New subpoenas issued
episodes.description:
New Mexico's Survivors' Truth Commission held its third meeting Thursday. The Truth Commission's work is centered on financier Jeffrey Epstein and his Zorro Ranch. After one round of subpoenas, they announced another round Thursday.
